/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -Wdouble-promotion -municode -ffast-math -g -DDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/link.d  -static-libgcc -Wl,--enable-stdcall-fixup -Wl,--kill-at -Wl,--nxcompat -Wl,--disable-auto-image-base -Wl,--dynamicbase -Wl,--high-entropy-va -Wl,--image-base -Wl,0x180000000 -shared -Wl,-soname,mCtrl.so -o mCtrl.so CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/anim.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/color.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/compat.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/debug.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/doublebuffer.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/dsa.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/dwm.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/generic.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/labeledit.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/mditab.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/misc.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/module.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/mousedrag.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/mousewheel.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/rgn16.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/table.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/theme.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/tooltip.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/treelist.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/version.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/viewlist.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/xcom.c.o CMakeFiles/mCtrl.dir/xdraw.c.o  -lgdi32 -lcomctl32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -luuid -lwindowscodecs ../../../libhsluv-c.a ../../../libwindrawlib.a -lm
